message:
test(search): add storage integration tests for hypothesis similarity (c2u8)

Tests for storageToIndexed and storageToIndexedBatch functions:
- Converts storage Hypothesis to IndexedHypothesis format
- Maps confidence levels (high/medium/low/speculative -> numeric)
- Handles missing mechanism and tags
- Batch conversion
